name: nypd-sergeant-study-guide
description: NYPD Sergeant Promotional Exam study guide with web app and PDF output

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:pdf
scripts.deploy: npm run build:web && cp src/index.html src/manifest.json src/sw.js docs/ && git add docs/ && echo 'Ready to commit: git commit -am "Deploy update" && git push'
